Title: Register a new user with valid username password name and email
Test Steps: 1. Open MyBasket Lite in the browser | 2. Navigate to the Register page (/register) | 3. Fill in the Full Name field with a valid name | 4. Fill in the Email field with a unique email address | 5. Fill in the Password field with a strong password | 6. Fill in the Confirm Password field with the same password | 7. Click the Register button | 8. Verify registration succeeds and user is redirected without any error message

Title: Verify registered user receives a JWT token in the response
Test Steps: 1. Open the Login page (/login) | 2. Enter the registered Email and Password | 3. Click the Sign In button | 4. Verify login succeeds and the account button in the top-right navigation shows your username | 5. Navigate to My Orders and verify the page loads without redirecting to the login page (confirms an active session token was issued)

Title: Verify registered user profile is returned without the password field
Test Steps: 1. Log in with valid credentials on the Login page (/login) | 2. Click the account button in the top-right navigation bar | 3. Verify the Account Settings page opens at /account | 4. Verify the Full Name field displays the name used during registration | 5. Verify the Email field displays the email used during registration | 6. Verify the New Password field is empty and no password value is pre-filled or visible

Title: Login with valid username and password
Test Steps: 1. Open the Login page (/login) | 2. Fill in the Email field with a registered email address | 3. Fill in the Password field with the correct password | 4. Click the Sign In button | 5. Verify the user is redirected to the home page | 6. Verify the account button in the top-right navigation bar shows the logged-in user name

Title: Verify successful login returns a valid JWT token
Test Steps: 1. Open the Login page (/login) and sign in with valid credentials | 2. Verify the account button in the top-right shows your username after login | 3. Click My Orders in the navigation and verify the page loads without redirecting to login | 4. Click the account button to open Account Settings | 5. Verify the Account Settings page loads confirming the session token is valid and active

Title: Verify login response includes the user public profile
Test Steps: 1. Open the Login page (/login) | 2. Enter a valid Email and Password and click Sign In | 3. After login click the account button in the top-right navigation bar | 4. Verify the Account Settings page opens showing the correct Full Name | 5. Verify the Email field displays the correct email address used during login

Title: Verify a valid JWT token using the verify endpoint
Test Steps: 1. Log in with valid credentials on the Login page (/login) | 2. Click the account button in the top-right to open Account Settings | 3. Verify the profile info block shows: Signed in as [your email] | 4. Refresh the browser page | 5. Verify Account Settings still loads after refresh and user is not redirected to the login page | 6. Verify the Full Name and Email fields still display the correct values after page refresh

Title: Verify the correct user profile is returned for a valid token
Test Steps: 1. Log in with a specific account (e.g. awesome@example.com) | 2. Click the account button in the top-right navigation bar | 3. Verify the Account Settings page opens | 4. Verify the profile info line shows: Signed in as awesome@example.com | 5. Verify the Full Name field shows the name registered for this account | 6. Verify the Email field shows awesome@example.com

Title: Retrieve user profile by a valid user ID
Test Steps: 1. Log in with valid credentials on the Login page (/login) | 2. Click the account button in the top-right navigation bar | 3. Verify the Account Settings page opens at /account | 4. Verify the page heading reads Account Settings | 5. Verify the Full Name field is populated with the user name | 6. Verify the Email field is populated with the user email address

Title: Verify returned profile contains id username name email createdAt and updatedAt
Test Steps: 1. Log in with valid credentials and click the account button in the top-right | 2. Verify Account Settings shows the Full Name and Email fields populated | 3. Verify the profile info line shows: Signed in as [email] - Member since [date] (confirms createdAt is stored) | 4. Update the Full Name field with a new name and click Save Changes | 5. Verify a success message appears confirming the update was saved (confirms updatedAt is tracked)

Title: Update Account user name with a valid authenticated request
Test Steps: 1. Log in with valid credentials and click the account button in the top-right navigation bar | 2. Verify the Account Settings page opens | 3. Clear the Full Name field and type a new valid name (e.g. Updated Name) | 4. Leave the New Password and Confirm New Password fields empty | 5. Click the Save Changes button | 6. Verify a success message appears confirming the name was updated

Title: Update Account user email with a valid authenticated request
Test Steps: 1. Log in with valid credentials and click the account button in the top-right navigation bar | 2. Verify the Account Settings page opens | 3. Clear the Email field and type a new valid email address | 4. Leave the New Password and Confirm New Password fields empty | 5. Click the Save Changes button | 6. Verify a success message appears confirming the email was updated

Title: Update Account user password with a valid authenticated request
Test Steps: 1. Log in with valid credentials and click the account button in the top-right navigation bar | 2. Verify the Account Settings page opens | 3. Note the text: Leave password fields empty to keep your current password | 4. Click the New Password field (placeholder: New password optional) and type a new password | 5. Click the Confirm New Password field (placeholder: Confirm new password) and type the same password | 6. Click the Save Changes button | 7. Verify a success message appears | 8. Log out then log back in using the new password to confirm it works

Title: Verify updated fields are reflected when fetching the profile after update
Test Steps: 1. Log in and click the account button to open Account Settings | 2. Clear the Full Name field and type a new unique name (e.g. Verified User) | 3. Click the Save Changes button and verify the success message appears | 4. Click Products in the top navigation bar to leave Account Settings | 5. Click the account button again to reopen Account Settings | 6. Verify the Full Name field now shows the updated name | 7. Verify the Email field still shows the original email address unchanged

Title: Register then Login then Verify Token then Get Profile then Update Profile
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the Register page (/register) and fill in Full Name + Email + Password + Confirm Password with new unique values then click Register | 2. Navigate to the Login page (/login) and enter the registered email and password then click Sign In | 3. Verify login succeeds and the account button in the top-right navigation shows your username | 4. Click the account button to open Account Settings and verify the profile info shows: Signed in as [your email] | 5. Verify the Full Name and Email fields match the values entered during registration | 6. Update the Full Name field with a new name and click Save Changes | 7. Click Products in the navigation then click the account button again | 8. Verify the Full Name shows the updated name confirming the complete end-to-end flow works
